transcript: The responses are interesting. Either they get it right away and they think it's the most amazing thing they've ever heard of, or they think it's just completely absurd and a waste of time. time. Hikaru Dora Dango is Japanese for shiny dumpling, I think is the exact translation. is a mud ball that is carefully formed and you just start forming the sphere and you'll start adding the dry material to it. Once I read about it I had to do it myself. I was out doing it the next day. It took me 30 tries maybe even a little bit more. I was very persistent at it and kept at it solid for probably a month. I'm continuously interested in different things. I always want to experiment with different soils and there's always a chance I'll get better at it. It's something I can improve on. It's very relaxing that way and it's so easy to get sucked into a flow state.
